creator: robertostrander@protonmail.com
text:
Created attachment 229006
Build Log

Some tests included with openH264 are failing when building the software in a Poudriere environment. I'm not aware of any upstream issues currently, but plan to check this out.

I've ran a build twice, and it has failed on the same tests, so I don't believe hardware would be an issue here.

I've attached a build log as a record.
